# Mapping between PTM positions and consensus sequence positions
# Format: PTM_Index	Alignment_Position	Consensus_Position	Consensus_AA
1	8	8	F
2	27	27	P
3	30	30	E
4	58	58	E
5	96	96	T
6	139	139	S
7	179	179	Q
8	208	208	G
9	216	216	Q
10	222	222	F
11	225	225	L
12	239	239	G
13	241	241	I
14	256	256	I
15	259	259	F
16	262	262	T
17	264	264	P
18	294	294	P
19	305	305	D
20	321	321	I
21	349	349	N
22	354	354	P
23	361	361	K
24	364	364	Q
25	386	386	V
26	393	393	D
27	395	395	D
28	409	409	E
29	471	471	A
30	501	501	G
31	513	513	D
32	568	568	G
33	614	614	K
34	624	624	P
35	635	635	V
36	703	703	A
37	708	708	S
